seoTitle: Situations : product & technical support | Luc Rousseau
seoDescription: Two quick questions to find your page: tech team, PM/PO, archaic WordPress, editorial platform, SaaS MVP, or product AI.
title: Which situation fits you?
lede:
In under a minute, find the page that matches your context: fractional product and technical support in Quebec.

Seven profiles covered: post-funding and first dev hire, solo developer, fractional PM or PO, phased rebuild, editorial platform, SaaS MVP, and product AI with guardrails.

q1.question: Which situation sounds most like you today?

team.question: On the technical side, what fits you best?

live.question: For this live product, your main priority is…

launch.question: For this launch, you're mainly looking to…

team.label: Strengthen the technical team
team.hint: First dev hire after funding, or one developer carrying everything

product.label: Structure product leadership (PM / PO)
product.hint: Priorities, roadmap, and dev ceremonies: not a major stack rebuild or WordPress migration

live.label: Evolve a product already in production
live.hint: Archaic or slow WordPress, editorial platform at scale, or AI in what you already ship

launch.label: Launch something new
launch.hint: MVP or SaaS, or an offer where AI is central

first-hire.label: Post-funding, before your first full-time developer
first-hire.hint: Product priorities, backlog, and fractional senior vs first hire within the same budget band

solo-dev.label: One developer carries all technical responsibility
solo-dev.hint: Reduce bus factor, day-to-day relief, vacation coverage

rebuild.label: Archaic, slow WordPress or stack rebuild
rebuild.hint: Modern headless or Laravel admin and API, phased without big bang

editorial.label: Run an editorial product at scale
editorial.hint: Comparator, conversion, partnerships, monetization: editorial and marketing on one system

ai-live.label: Clarify AI in your existing product
ai-live.hint: Where it fits, guardrails, POC before you commit to build

mvp.label: Frame an MVP or SaaS before building big
mvp.hint: Feasibility, stack, scope, and prerequisites for your devs or agency

ai-launch.label: Launch an AI-centric offer
ai-launch.hint: Product and technical decisions, not a checkbox « we have AI » feature

premier-dev-fractionnel.title: Post-funding: before your first full-time developer
premier-dev-fractionnel.quote: We raised, we have customers, we have a roadmap. What we don't have is someone who knows what to build first.
premier-dev-fractionnel.teaser: Post-funding, first tech hire: two days a week, four-step flow (frame, backlog, build, hire prep), with a senior principal developer who builds.

dev-unique-backup.title: One developer carries all technical responsibility
dev-unique-backup.quote: If my dev is out sick for two weeks, I don't even know what's happening in our own code.
dev-unique-backup.teaser: Senior backup 1 day/week: reachable on weekdays, emergency coverage, Laravel, React, WordPress alignment, without hiring a second full-time developer.

product-manager-fractionnel.title: PM or PO need, without full-time
product-manager-fractionnel.quote: My devs ship. But I'm no longer sure we're shipping the right things in the right order.
product-manager-fractionnel.teaser: You need real product leadership, not a 40-hour seat : regular half-days, full day when needed, priorities, prerequisites, and ceremonies.

refonte-produit-par-phases.title: Archaic WordPress: headless or Laravel by phases
refonte-produit-par-phases.quote: Our site stays up, but every new feature costs twice what it should. We've been putting off the rebuild for two years.
refonte-produit-par-phases.teaser: Archaic WordPress: move into a modern stack (headless, Laravel), fractional PM/PO, plan without big bang.

plateforme-editoriale-produit.title: Editorial product at scale
plateforme-editoriale-produit.quote: We publish 50 pieces a week and our stack was built for 5. We can feel we're hitting the wall.
plateforme-editoriale-produit.teaser: Comparator or multi-brand: conversion, visible partnerships, monetization, without ad-hoc integrations every launch.

mvp-saas-faisabilite.title: Launching a SaaS or MVP
mvp-saas-faisabilite.quote: I have a clear idea, a budget, and zero interest in spending 6 months building something nobody wants.
mvp-saas-faisabilite.teaser: Fractional SaaS or MVP: four steps, phases and backlog, steering devs or agency, CEO/CTO validation (Lovable, Cursor) before big spend.

ia-produit-garde-fous.title: AI in your product
ia-produit-garde-fous.quote: Everyone's asking if we're doing AI. We don't know where to start without it becoming a gimmick or a risk.
ia-produit-garde-fous.teaser: Product AI: prerequisites, risks, scope, and anti-hallucination before build, Claude/OpenAI APIs, build vs buy. Four-step mandate, POC before prod.
